steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Look for the row in the table where the dolphin ID is "FB43." This is the only clue needed to identify the correct year.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The table lists FB43 and her associated year directly in the same row. The other choices refer to different dolphin IDs or years from unrelated entries. That matches Choice D — 1992.
